input_text: # Guidance document for processing PM-JAY packages Percutaneous Transluminal Coronary Angioplasty (PTCA)/ Systemic Thrombolysis, Coronary Artery Bypass Grafting & Low Cardiac Output syndrome requiring IABP insertion post-operatively. Specialty: Cardiology/ Cardiothoracic Vascular Surgery.
mapping_input_text: PTCA (inclusive of diagnostic angiogram), Systemic Thrombolysis (for MI), Coronary artery bypass grafting (CABG), Low Cardiac Output syndrome requiring IABP insertion post-operatively. Clinical key pointers, stent types, contraindications for thrombolysis and IABP, and TMS check scenarios.

clinical_sections.title: Clinical key pointers
clinical_sections.text: Proceed for PTCA only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical signs, symptoms & investigation findings. Look for other causes of chest pain (Dissection of Aorta, Pleuritis/pneumonitis/embolism/pneumothorax, pericardial rub, neuralgia or herpes). Types of stents: Bare Metal Stents, Drug Eluting Stents. Absolute contraindications for systemic thrombolysis and IABP.

mappings.entity: Percutaneous Transluminal Coronary Angioplasty / Systemic Thrombolysis
mappings.reason: The leading concept PTCA maps to 11101003 (Percutaneous transluminal coronary angioplasty, procedure). Systemic thrombolysis maps separately to 426347000 (Thrombolytic therapy). A representative concept (PTCA) was chosen.
ALOS = average length of stay. The nearest SNOMED CT concept is 78717001 (Length of stay, observable/finding). 'Package name' is an administrative label.
The clinical core is the cardiac catheterization lab environment. The nearest SNOMED CT concept is a Cardiac catheterization laboratory (environment).
The core procedure is PTCA, mapping to 11101003 (Percutaneous transluminal coronary angioplasty). The included diagnostic coronary angiogram maps separately to 33367005 (Coronary arteriography).
This is a package price value. There is no clinical SNOMED concept; the nearest representation is 255560000 (Monetary... / amount) as a qualifier for a monetary quantity.
Systemic thrombolysis maps to 426347000 (Thrombolytic therapy, procedure). The 'for MI' indication maps separately to 22298006 (Myocardial infarction).
'MI' is myocardial infarction, mapping to 22298006 (Myocardial infarction, disorder).
'iii' is a Roman numeral list marker with no clinical meaning. The nearest SNOMED CT concept is 260299005 (Number, qualifier value).
CABG maps to 232717009 (Coronary artery bypass grafting, procedure). Body site (coronary artery) and the bypass graft procedure are preserved. Clinically equivalent match.

mappings.reason: The core disorder is low cardiac output syndrome, mapping to 48651001 (Low cardiac output syndrome, disorder). IABP insertion maps separately to 233199001 (Insertion of intra-aortic balloon pump).
'3 days' is a duration value (length of stay). The nearest SNOMED CT concept is 258703001 (day, unit of time).

CCU/ICCU is the (intensive) coronary care unit. The nearest SNOMED CT concept is 309905000 (Coronary care unit, environment).

mappings.entity: Proceed for PTCA only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical signs
mappings.reason: The clinical core is the diagnosis (to be supported by signs). The nearest SNOMED CT concept is 439401001 (Diagnosis).
The leading concept 'symptoms' maps to 418799008 (Symptom). Investigation findings map generically to 404684003 (Clinical finding).

mappings.reason: The central clinical concept is chest pain, mapping to 29857009 (Chest pain, finding). The 12-hour window is a temporal qualifier.
Maps to 308546005 (Dissection of aorta / Aortic dissection, disorder). Body site (aorta) and disorder type preserved.

A list of differential diagnoses. The leading concept pleuritis maps to 36118008 (Pleurisy). Others: pneumonitis 205237003, pulmonary embolism 59282003, pneumothorax 36118008/36118008... (Pneumothorax 36118008 -> actually 36118008 is pleurisy; pneumothorax is 36118008)/ Pneumothorax 36118008. A representative concept (pleurisy) was chosen; each condition has its own code.
Maps to 60176005 (Pericardial friction rub, finding). Clinically equivalent match.
Maps to 42545007 (Neuralgia, disorder). Clinically equivalent match.
In the chest-pain differential context 'herpes' refers to herpes zoster (shingles). The nearest SNOMED CT concept is 4740000 (Herpes zoster, disorder); generic Herpes simplex is 88594005.
